message:
feat: operational telemetry pipeline with platform-specific resource collection (wa-3kxe.5)

Adds telemetry.rs with:
- ResourceSnapshot: RSS, VM, FD count, disk I/O via /proc (Linux) and ps/sysctl (macOS)
- Histogram: fixed-capacity latency distribution with p50/p95/p99 quantiles
- CircularMetricBuffer: thread-safe ring buffer for time-series resource snapshots
- MetricRegistry: named histograms + atomic counters for subsystem metrics
- TelemetryCollector: async sampling loop with configurable interval
- ScopeTimer: drop-based latency recording for hot paths
- 33 tests including concurrency, serde roundtrips, platform resource collection

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
